text:
- Update to 2.7.1
- Adjust versions of textproc/py-MarkupSafe and devel/py-babel

It's full compatible with Python 3 (it needs PR181218 [1] update devel/py-babel).

Note: Documentation has been tested with textproc/py-sphinx 1.2 beta1 (not presents in ports tree).

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=181218
